title: [codereview-2] Updated Zephyr regex misses some possible log formats like 'Send hash=' without colon or 'RECV:' variants (P4 readability/robustness)
description: The new regex requires 'Send: hash' exactly (with colon) or 'Recv hash'. Zephyr LOG_INF may use 'Send hash=...' or other variants from lora_ping or other samples. Make regex more flexible while keeping specificity e.g. r'(?i)(?:Send|TX).*?hash' with word boundary. discovered-from:project-LICHEN-0k11
